## Scaling multiple dataframes

```{r}

#' Standardise selected columns across a list of data frames
#'
#' Applies \code{datawizard::standardise()} to user-specified columns in each
#' data frame of a list, adding the result as new columns with "Scl"
#' appended to the original column name. Standardisation can be switched on
#' or off per variable via the \code{scale} argument.
#'
#' @param df_list A list of data frames.
#' @param vars    Character vector of column names to (optionally) standardise.
#' @param scale   Controls which variables get full standardisation vs.
#'                centering only:
#'                \itemize{
#'                  \item A single logical (default \code{TRUE}) applied to all \code{vars}.
#'                  \item An unnamed logical vector the same length as \code{vars},
#'                        matched by position.
#'                  \item A named logical vector, e.g. \code{c(height = TRUE, weight = FALSE)}.
#'                        Any variable in \code{vars} not named here defaults to \code{TRUE}.
#'                }
#'                Variables with \code{scale = TRUE} are run through
#'                \code{datawizard::standardise()} (centered AND scaled to SD = 1).
#'                Variables with \code{scale = FALSE} are run through
#'                \code{datawizard::center()} instead, so they are still
#'                mean-centered but left on their original scale (SD unchanged).
#'                Either way the new "Scl" column is always created.
#' @param ...     Additional arguments passed on to \code{datawizard::standardise()}
#'                and \code{datawizard::center()} (e.g. \code{robust}).
#'                Note: only arguments valid for both functions can safely be
#'                passed this way (see Details).
#'
#' @return A list of data frames (same length/order as \code{df_list}), each
#'         with new "<var>Scl" columns added.
#'
#' @examples
#' \dontrun{
#' library(datawizard)
#'
#' df1 <- data.frame(height = rnorm(10, 170, 10), weight = rnorm(10, 70, 15))
#' df2 <- data.frame(height = rnorm(10, 165, 8),  weight = rnorm(10, 65, 12))
#'
#' dfs <- list(df1, df2)
#'
#' # Standardise both variables in every data frame
#' out <- standardise_list(dfs, vars = c("height", "weight"))
#'
#' # Fully standardise height, but only center weight (weightScl keeps its
#' # original SD, just shifted to a mean of 0)
#' out2 <- standardise_list(dfs, vars = c("height", "weight"),
#'                           scale = c(height = TRUE, weight = FALSE))
#' }
#'
#' @export
standardise_list <- function(df_list, vars, scale = TRUE, ...) {

  # --- Input checks --------------------------------------------------------
  if (!is.list(df_list) || !all(vapply(df_list, is.data.frame, logical(1)))) {
    stop("`df_list` must be a list of data frames.")
  }
  if (!is.character(vars) || length(vars) == 0) {
    stop("`vars` must be a non-empty character vector of column names.")
  }
  if (!is.logical(scale)) {
    stop("`scale` must be logical (TRUE/FALSE), optionally named.")
  }

  # --- Expand `scale` into a named logical vector aligned with `vars` -----
  if (length(scale) == 1) {
    scale <- stats::setNames(rep(scale, length(vars)), vars)
  } else {
    if (is.null(names(scale))) {
      if (length(scale) != length(vars)) {
        stop("`scale` must be length 1, named, or the same length as `vars`.")
      }
      names(scale) <- vars
    }
    # Any vars not explicitly named in `scale` default to TRUE
    missing_vars <- setdiff(vars, names(scale))
    if (length(missing_vars) > 0) {
      scale <- c(scale, stats::setNames(rep(TRUE, length(missing_vars)), missing_vars))
    }
    scale <- scale[vars]  # align order, drop any extras not in `vars`
  }

  # --- Apply to each data frame --------------------------------------------
  lapply(df_list, function(df) {

    present_vars <- intersect(vars, names(df))
    absent_vars  <- setdiff(vars, names(df))

    if (length(absent_vars) > 0) {
      warning("Columns not found and skipped: ", paste(absent_vars, collapse = ", "))
    }

    for (v in present_vars) {
      new_name <- paste0(v, "Scl")

      if (isTRUE(scale[[v]])) {
        df[[new_name]] <- datawizard::standardise(df[[v]], ...)
      } else {
        df[[new_name]] <- datawizard::center(df[[v]], ...)
      }
    }

    df
  })
}

```


# Import data and wrangle

## Parts A & B combined

```{r}

subjDataPath <- utils::choose.files(caption=r"(Select refmap_listest1_testdata_BySubj.csv from 03 Experiment\Experiment 1\Analysis\PostProcess)",
                                     filters=matrix(data=c("refmap_listest1_testdata_BySubj.csv", "refmap_listest1_testdata_BySubj.csv"), ncol=2))

subjData <- read.csv(subjDataPath, header=TRUE)

stimDataPath <- utils::choose.files(caption=r"(Select refmap_listest1_testdata_ByStim.csv from 03 Experiment\Experiment 1\Analysis\PostProcess)",
                                     filters=matrix(data=c("refmap_listest1_testdata_ByStim.csv", "refmap_listest1_testdata_ByStim.csv"), ncol=2))

stimData <- read.csv(stimDataPath, header=TRUE, row.names=1)

```

```{r}
# definition of ordinal variable levels
UASLAeqCatsA <- c("Baseline", "42", "48", "54", "60")
SNRCatsA <- c("Baseline", "-16", "-10", "-4", "2", "8")
UASOpCatsA <- c("Baseline", "Overflight", "Landing", "Takeoff")
UASTypeCatsA <- c("Baseline", "H520", "M300", "T150")

# encode factors
subjData$ID <- factor(subjData$ID)
subjData$SessionPart <- factor(subjData$SessionPart)
subjData$UASLAeq <- factor(subjData$UASLAeq, levels=UASLAeqCatsA, order=TRUE)
subjData$SNRlevel <- factor(subjData$SNRlevel, levels=SNRCatsA, order=TRUE)
subjData$UASOperation <- factor(subjData$UASOperation, levels=UASOpCatsA)
subjData$UASType <- factor(subjData$UASType, levels=UASTypeCatsA)
subjData$AmbientEnv <- factor(subjData$AmbientEnv, levels=c("Park", "Street"))
subjData$AAM_attitude <- factor(subjData$AAM_attitude)
subjData$Home_Area <- factor(subjData$Home_Area)
subjData$Area_soundscape <- factor(subjData$Area_soundscape)
subjData$NationGeo <- factor(subjData$NationGeo)

stimData$UASOperation <- factor(stimData$UASOperation, levels=UASOpCatsA)
stimData$UASType <- factor(stimData$UASType, levels=UASTypeCatsA)

# For Age column in subjData, replace "No answer" with NA, and then convert to numeric using dplyr and pipe
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(Age = case_when(Age == "No answer" ~ NA_character_, TRUE ~ Age)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(Age = as.numeric(Age))

# recode AAM_attitude to 3 groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(AAM_attitude3 = dplyr::recode_values(AAM_attitude,
                                                                    "Supportive" ~ "Supportive",
                                                                    c("Ambivalent",
                                                                      "Concerned") ~ "Ambiv_Concern",
                                                                      "Neutral" ~ "Neutral"))
subjData$AAM_attitude3 <- factor(subjData$AAM_attitude3, levels=c("Supportive", "Ambiv_Concern", "Neutral"))

# recode AAM_attitude to 2 groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(AAM_attitude2 = dplyr::recode_values(AAM_attitude,
                                                                    "Supportive" ~ "Supportive",
                                                                    c("Ambivalent",
                                                                      "Concerned",
                                                                      "Neutral") ~ "Ambiv_Concern_Neutral"))
subjData$AAM_attitude2 <- factor(subjData$AAM_attitude2, levels=c("Supportive", "Ambiv_Concern_Neutral"))

# recode AAM_attitude to 2 other groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(AAM_attitude2_2 = dplyr::recode_values(AAM_attitude,
                                                                    c("Supportive",
                                                                      "Ambivalent") ~ "Support_Ambiv",
                                                                    c("Concerned",
                                                                      "Neutral") ~ "Concern_Neutral"))

subjData$AAM_attitude2_2 <- factor(subjData$AAM_attitude2_2, levels=c("Support_Ambiv", "Concern_Neutral"))

# recode NationGeo to 4 groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(NationGeo4 = dplyr::recode_values(NationGeo,
                                                               "UK" ~ "UK",
                                                               c("Africa",
                                                                 "SouthAsia") ~ "Africa_SAsia",
                                                               c("Australasia",
                                                                 "EastAsia",
                                                                 "Europe",
                                                                 "MidEast",
                                                                 "SouthAmerica") ~ "Other",
                                                               "" ~ "Unspecified"))
subjData$NationGeo4 <- factor(subjData$NationGeo4)

# recode NationGeo to 3 groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(NationGeo3 = dplyr::recode_values(NationGeo,
                                                                 "UK" ~ "UK",
                                                                 c("Africa",
                                                                   "SouthAsia") ~ "Africa_SAsia",
                                                                 c("Australasia",
                                                                   "EastAsia",
                                                                   "Europe",
                                                                   "MidEast",
                                                                   "SouthAmerica",
                                                                   "") ~ "Other"))
subjData$NationGeo3 <- factor(subjData$NationGeo3)

# recode NationGeo to 2 groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(NationGeo2 = dplyr::recode_values(NationGeo,
                                                                 "UK" ~ "UK",
                                                                 c("Africa",
                                                                   "SouthAsia",
                                                                   "Australasia",
                                                                   "EastAsia",
                                                                   "Europe",
                                                                   "MidEast",
                                                                   "SouthAmerica",
                                                                   "") ~ "Other"))
subjData$NationGeo2 <- factor(subjData$NationGeo2)


subjData$NationGeo3 <- factor(subjData$NationGeo3)

# recode Area of residence to 2 groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(Home_Area2 = dplyr::recode_values(Home_Area,
                                                         "Urban" ~ "Urban",
                                                         c("Suburban",
                                                           "Rural") ~ "Suburban_Rural"))
subjData$Home_Area2 <- factor(subjData$Home_Area2)


# recode Area soundscape to 2 groups
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(Area_soundscape2 = dplyr::recode_values(Area_soundscape,
                                                                       c("Calm",
                                                                         "Monotonous") ~ "Uneventful",
                                                                       c("Chaotic",
                                                                         "Vibrant") ~ "Eventful"))

subjData$Area_soundscape2 <- factor(subjData$Area_soundscape2)

subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(UASDisc0p5PAEMaxLR = 2e-5*10^(UASDisc0p5LAEMaxLR/20))
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(IntermitRatioC2MaxLRScl = IntermitRatioC2MaxLR/100)
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(IntermitRatioC3MaxLRScl = IntermitRatioC3MaxLR/100)
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(IntermitRatioC5MaxLRScl = IntermitRatioC5MaxLR/100)

stimData <- stimData |> dplyr::mutate(UASDisc0p5PAEMaxLR = 2e-5*10^(UASDisc0p5LAEMaxLR/20))
stimData <- stimData |> dplyr::mutate(IntermitRatioC2MaxLRScl = IntermitRatioC2MaxLR/100)
stimData <- stimData |> dplyr::mutate(IntermitRatioC3MaxLRScl = IntermitRatioC3MaxLR/100)
stimData <- stimData |> dplyr::mutate(IntermitRatioC5MaxLRScl = IntermitRatioC5MaxLR/100)

# Log other variables
subjData$PartLoudMGLT05ExLog <- log(subjData$PartLoudMGLT05Ex)
subjData$PartLoudMGST05ExLog <- log(subjData$PartLoudMGST05Ex)
subjData$PartLoudMGLTPowAvgLog <- log(subjData$PartLoudMGLTPowAvg)
subjData$PartLoudMGSTPowAvgLog <- log(subjData$PartLoudMGSTPowAvg)
subjData$PartLoudSHMPowAvgLog <- log(subjData$PartLoudSHMPowAvg)

stimData$PartLoudMGLT05ExLog <- log(stimData$PartLoudMGLT05Ex)
stimData$PartLoudMGST05ExLog <- log(stimData$PartLoudMGST05Ex)
stimData$PartLoudMGLTPowAvgLog <- log(stimData$PartLoudMGLTPowAvg)
stimData$PartLoudMGSTPowAvgLog <- log(stimData$PartLoudMGSTPowAvg)
stimData$PartLoudSHMPowAvgLog <- log(stimData$PartLoudSHMPowAvg)

# reorder by participant ID and trial number
subjData <- subjData[with(subjData, order(ID, TrialNumber)), ]

# re-encode Annoyance variables as ordinal
subjData <- subjData |> dplyr::mutate(AnnoyanceOrd=factor(Annoyance,
                                                          levels=seq(0, 10, by=1),
                                                          ordered=TRUE),
                                      dAnnoyanceOrd=factor(dAnnoyance,
                                                           levels=seq(-10, 10, by=1),
                                                           ordered=TRUE))

# add a rescaled dAnnoyance variable
subjData <- subjData |>
  dplyr::mutate(AnnoyanceOrdBetaScl = betaTransform(Annoyance, 0, 10,
                                                    direction='forward', squeeze='none'),
                dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl = betaTransform(dAnnoyance, -10, 10,
                                                     direction='forward', squeeze='none'))

# add a rescaled dAnnoyance variable
stimData <- stimData |>
  dplyr::mutate(AnnoyMeanOrdBetaScl = betaTransform(AnnoyMean, 0, 10,
                                                    direction='forward', squeeze='none'),
                dAnnoyMeanOrdBetaScl = betaTransform(dAnnoyMean, -10, 10,
                                                     direction='forward', squeeze='none'))

# omit ambient-only stimuli
subjDataNoAmb <- subjData |> dplyr::filter(UASLAeq != "Baseline")
stimDataNoAmb <- stimData |> dplyr::filter(UASLAeq != "Baseline")

```

## filter and impute missing age data (median imputation)

```{R}

# filter data to exclude the missing age participant and the missing response data
subjDataNoAmb.cc <- subjDataNoAmb |> dplyr::filter(!is.na(Age) & !is.na(TrialNumber))

# first create a participant-level dataset
subj_dat <- subjData |> dplyr::select(ID, Age) |> dplyr::distinct()

# create a median imputation for missing age data
subj_dat.med <- subj_dat |> dplyr::mutate(Age = ifelse(is.na(Age),
                                                   median(Age, na.rm=TRUE),
                                                   Age))

# now merge the imputed age data back into the main dataset
subjData.med <- subjData |> dplyr::select(-Age) |> dplyr::left_join(subj_dat.med, by="ID")

# now filter the dataset to exclude ambient-only stimuli
subjDataNoAmb.med <- subjData.med |> dplyr::filter(UASLAeq != "Baseline") |>
  droplevels()

```

## rescaling variables

```{r}

# rescale variables

out <- standardise_list(list(subjData, subjDataNoAmb, subjDataNoAmb.cc,
                             subjDataNoAmb.med, stimData, stimDataNoAmb),
                        vars = c("UASLAeqMaxLR", "UASLAEMaxLR", "UASEPNLMaxLR",
                                 "LAELAF50diff", "LAELAF90diff", "LAELAeqdiff",
                                 "EPNLLAF50diff", "UASDisc0p1LAEMaxLR", "UASDisc0p5LAEMaxLR",
                                 "UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin",  "AmbLAeqMaxLR", "AmbLAF50ExMaxLR",
                                 "Detect0p5dBIntMaxLR", "Detect0p1dBIntMaxLR",
                                 "Detect0p5dBIntEx50MaxLR", "Detect0p1dBMaxIntMaxLR",
                                 "UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLR", "UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLR",
                                 "UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR",
                                 "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin", "UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin"),
                        scale = FALSE)

subjData <- out[[1]]
subjDataNoAmb <- out[[2]]
subjDataNoAmb.cc <- out[[3]]
subjDataNoAmb.med <- out[[4]]
stimData <- out[[5]]
stimDataNoAmb <- out[[6]]

out <- standardise_list(list(subjData, subjDataNoAmb, subjDataNoAmb.cc, subjDataNoAmb.med),
                        vars = c("TrialNumber"),
                        scale = TRUE)

subjData <- out[[1]]
subjDataNoAmb <- out[[2]]
subjDataNoAmb.cc <- out[[3]]
subjDataNoAmb.med <- out[[4]]

# rescale trial number variables separately for each session part
subjData <- rbind(subjData[subjData$SessionPart == "A", ] |>
                    dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE)),
                    subjData[subjData$SessionPart == "B", ] |>
                    dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE))) |>
  droplevels()

subjDataNoAmb <- rbind(subjDataNoAmb[subjDataNoAmb$SessionPart == "A", ] |>
                         dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE)),
                    subjDataNoAmb[subjDataNoAmb$SessionPart == "B", ] |>
                      dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE))) |>
  droplevels()

subjDataNoAmb.cc <- rbind(subjDataNoAmb.cc[subjDataNoAmb.cc$SessionPart == "A", ] |>
                            dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE)),
                    subjDataNoAmb.cc[subjDataNoAmb.cc$SessionPart == "B", ] |>
                      dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE))) |>
  droplevels()

subjDataNoAmb.med <- rbind(subjDataNoAmb.med[subjDataNoAmb.med$SessionPart == "A", ] |>
                             dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE)),
                    subjDataNoAmb.med[subjDataNoAmb.med$SessionPart == "B", ] |>
                      dplyr::mutate(PartTrialNumberScl = datawizard::standardise(PartTrialNumber, scale=TRUE))) |>
  droplevels()

```

# Add external data

## Aalmoes (NLR) HA curves

```{r}

paramKNLR <- c(0.168, 0.152, 0.138, 0.158, 0.189, 0.148, 0.116, 0.085)
paramX0LAENLR <- c(82.2, 78.9, 77.4, 81.8, 81.0, 83.8, 92.2, 93.4)

rangeLAENLR <- seq(50, 90, by=0.1)

pHALAENLRFunc <- function(paramK, paramX0, abscissa){
  pHA <- 1/(1 + exp(-paramK*(abscissa - paramX0)))
  return(pHA)
} 

pHALAENLR <- data.frame(LAE = rangeLAENLR,
                        LAEScl = rangeLAENLR - (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) - max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                        Quad1=pHALAENLRFunc(paramKNLR[1], paramX0LAENLR[1], rangeLAENLR),
                        Quad2=pHALAENLRFunc(paramKNLR[2], paramX0LAENLR[2], rangeLAENLR),
                        Quad3=pHALAENLRFunc(paramKNLR[3], paramX0LAENLR[3], rangeLAENLR),
                        Quad4=pHALAENLRFunc(paramKNLR[4], paramX0LAENLR[4], rangeLAENLR))

pHALAENLR <- pHALAENLR |> tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c(Quad1, Quad2, Quad3, Quad4), names_to="UAS", values_to="pHA")

# adjust pHALAENLR LAE and LAEScl columns by -6 dB and make a new dataframe
pHALAENLRAdj <- pHALAENLR |> dplyr::mutate(LAE = LAE - 6,
                                           LAEScl = LAEScl - 6)

# make a new dataframe containing the min and max values at each LAE value from pHALAENLR
pHALAENLRUASRange <- pHALAENLR |> dplyr::group_by(LAE, LAEScl) |>
                        dplyr::summarise(pHAmin = min(pHA),
                                         pHAmax = max(pHA), .groups='drop')

# adjust pHALAENLRUASRange LAE and LAEScl columns by -6 dB and make a new dataframe
pHALAENLRUASRangeAdj <- pHALAENLRUASRange |> dplyr::mutate(LAE = LAE - 6,
                                                           LAEScl = LAEScl - 6)

pHALAENLRAir <- data.frame(LAE = rangeLAENLR,
                           LAEScl = rangeLAENLR - (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) - max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                           Air_taxi=pHALAENLRFunc(paramKNLR[6], paramX0LAENLR[6], rangeLAENLR),
                           Helicopter_1=pHALAENLRFunc(paramKNLR[7], paramX0LAENLR[7], rangeLAENLR),
                           Helicopter_2=pHALAENLRFunc(paramKNLR[8], paramX0LAENLR[8], rangeLAENLR))

pHALAENLRAir <- pHALAENLRAir |> tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c(Air_taxi, Helicopter_1, Helicopter_2), names_to="Type", values_to="pHA")

# adjust pHALAENLRAir LAE and LAEScl columns by -6 dB and make a new dataframe
pHALAENLRAirAdj <- pHALAENLRAir |> dplyr::mutate(LAE = LAE - 6,
                                                 LAEScl = LAEScl - 6)

# filter for pHA~0.5 and pHA~0.25
pHALAENLRSel <- pHALAENLR |> dplyr::filter(abs(pHA - 0.5) < 0.002 | abs(pHA - 0.25) < 0.002)
pHALAENLRSelAir <- pHALAENLRAir |> dplyr::filter(abs(pHA - 0.5) < 0.002 | abs(pHA - 0.25) < 0.002)


```

## Kawai (EMPA) HA curves

```{r}

paramb0EMPA <- c(-11.06)
paramb1LAEEMPA<- c(0.17)
paramtauSrcEMPA <- c(-0.91)

rangeLAEEMPA <- seq(53, 80, by=0.1)

pHALAEEMPAFunc <- function(paramb0, paramb1, paramtau, abscissa){
  pHA <- 1/(1 + exp(-(paramb0 + paramb1*abscissa + paramtau)))
  return(pHA)
} 

pHALAEEMPA <- data.frame(LAE = rangeLAEEMPA,
                         LAEScl = rangeLAEEMPA -
                           (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                              max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                        Mav2=pHALAEEMPAFunc(paramb0EMPA[1], paramb1LAEEMPA[1],
                                            0, rangeLAEEMPA),
                        M300=pHALAEEMPAFunc(paramb0EMPA[1], paramb1LAEEMPA[1],
                                            paramtauSrcEMPA[1], rangeLAEEMPA))

pHALAEEMPA <- pHALAEEMPA |> tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c(Mav2, M300), names_to="UAS", values_to="pHA")

# make a new dataframe containing the min and max values at each LAE value from pHALAEEMPA
pHALAEEMPAUASRange <- pHALAEEMPA |> dplyr::group_by(LAE, LAEScl) |>
                        dplyr::summarise(pHAmin = min(pHA),
                                         pHAmax = max(pHA), .groups='drop')

paramtauAirEMPA <- c(-1.66, -1.68, -1.76)

pHALAEEMPAAir <- data.frame(LAE = rangeLAEEMPA,
                            LAEScl = rangeLAEEMPA -
                              (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                 max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                        Helicopter=pHALAEEMPAFunc(paramb0EMPA[1], paramb1LAEEMPA[1],
                                            paramtauAirEMPA[1], rangeLAEEMPA),
                        Propeller=pHALAEEMPAFunc(paramb0EMPA[1], paramb1LAEEMPA[1],
                                            paramtauAirEMPA[2], rangeLAEEMPA),
                        Jet=pHALAEEMPAFunc(paramb0EMPA[1], paramb1LAEEMPA[1],
                                           paramtauAirEMPA[3], rangeLAEEMPA))

pHALAEEMPAAir <- pHALAEEMPAAir |> tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c(Helicopter, Propeller, Jet), names_to="Type", values_to="pHA")

# filter for pHA~0.5 and pHA~0.25
pHALAEEMPASel <- pHALAEEMPA |> dplyr::filter(abs(pHA - 0.5) < 0.002 | abs(pHA - 0.25) < 0.002)
pHALAEEMPASelAir <- pHALAEEMPAAir |> dplyr::filter(abs(pHA - 0.5) < 0.002 | abs(pHA - 0.25) < 0.002)

```

## Gwak HA curves

```{r}

paramkGwak <- c(0.17, 0.178, 0.165)
param0LAeqGwak <- c(13.512, 13.47, 12.184)/paramkGwak

param0LAEGwak <- param0LAeqGwak + 10*log10(7)

rangeLAeqGwak <- seq(40, 85, by=0.1)
rangeLAEGwak <- rangeLAeqGwak + 10*log10(7)

pHALAEGwakFunc <- function(paramb0, paramk, abscissa){
  pHA <- 1/(1 + exp(-paramk*(abscissa - paramb0)))
  return(pHA)
}

pHALAEGwak <- data.frame(LAE = rangeLAEGwak,
                         LAEScl = rangeLAEGwak -
                           (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR)
                            - max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                        H12W=pHALAEGwakFunc(param0LAEGwak[1], paramkGwak[1],
                                             rangeLAEGwak),
                        F450=pHALAEGwakFunc(param0LAEGwak[2], paramkGwak[2],
                                            rangeLAEGwak),
                        S1000=pHALAEGwakFunc(param0LAEGwak[3], paramkGwak[3],
                                            rangeLAEGwak))

pHALAEGwak <- pHALAEGwak |> tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c(H12W, F450, S1000), names_to="UAS", values_to="pHA")

# adjust pHALAEGwak LAE and LAEScl columns by -6 dB and make a new dataframe
pHALAEGwakAdj <- pHALAEGwak |> dplyr::mutate(LAE = LAE - 6,
                                             LAEScl = LAEScl - 6)

# make a new dataframe containing the min and max values at each LAE value from pHALAEGwak
pHALAEGwakUASRange <- pHALAEGwak |> dplyr::group_by(LAE, LAEScl) |>
                        dplyr::summarise(pHAmin = min(pHA),
                                         pHAmax = max(pHA), .groups='drop')

# adjust pHALAEGwakUASRange LAE and LAEScl columns by -6 dB and make a new dataframe
pHALAEGwakUASRangeAdj <- pHALAEGwakUASRange |> dplyr::mutate(LAE = LAE - 6,
                                                             LAEScl = LAEScl - 6)


paramkGwakAir <- 0.229
param0LAEGwakAir <- 18.94/paramkGwakAir + 10*log10(7)

pHALAEGwakAir <- data.frame(LAE = rangeLAEGwak,
                             LAEScl = rangeLAEGwak -
                              (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                 max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                             Jet=pHALAEGwakFunc(param0LAEGwakAir, paramkGwakAir,
                                                     rangeLAEGwak))

pHALAEGwakAir <- pHALAEGwakAir |> tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c(Jet), names_to="Type", values_to="pHA")

# adjust pHALAEGwakAir LAE and LAEScl columns by -6 dB and make a new dataframe
pHALAEGwakAirAdj <- pHALAEGwakAir |> dplyr::mutate(LAE = LAE - 6,
                                                   LAEScl = LAEScl - 6)


# filter for pHA~0.5 and pHA~0.25
pHALAEGwakSel <- pHALAEGwak |> dplyr::filter(abs(pHA - 0.5) < 0.002 | abs(pHA - 0.25) < 0.002)
pHALAEGwakSelAir <- pHALAEGwakAir |> dplyr::filter(abs(pHA - 0.5) < 0.002 | abs(pHA - 0.25) < 0.002)



```

## Jeong HA curves

```{r}

paramkJeong <- 0.2753
param0LAeqJeong <- 19.817/paramkJeong

param0LAEJeong <- param0LAeqJeong + 10*log10(5)

rangeLAeqJeong <- seq(40, 80, by=1)
rangeLAEJeong <- rangeLAeqJeong + 10*log10(5)

pHALAEJeongFunc <- function(paramb0, paramk, abscissa){
  pHA <- 1/(1 + exp(-paramk*(abscissa - paramb0)))
  return(pHA)
}

pHALAEJeong <- data.frame(LAE = rangeLAEJeong,
                         LAEScl = rangeLAEJeong - (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) - max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                         Motor_prop=pHALAEJeongFunc(param0LAEJeong, paramkJeong,
                                                    rangeLAEJeong))

pHALAEJeong <- pHALAEJeong |> tidyr::pivot_longer(cols=c(Motor_prop), names_to="UAS", values_to="pHA")

```

## Combine external HA data

```{r}

# compile pHALAEGwakUASRange, pHALAEEMPAUASRange and pHALAENLRUASRange into a single dataframe with a study column indicating the source study from 'Gwak et al.', 'Kawai et al.' or 'Aalmoes et al.'

pHALAEUASRangeAll <- rbind(
  pHALAEGwakUASRange |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Gwak et al."),
  pHALAEEMPAUASRange |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Kawai et al."),
  pHALAENLRUASRange |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Aalmoes et al.")
)

# make a new dataframe by adjusting the Gwak et al. and Aalmoes et al. studies in pHALAEUASRangeAll to reduce
# the values of LAE and LAEScl by 6 dB
pHALAEUASRangeAllAdj <- rbind(
  pHALAEGwakUASRangeAdj |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Gwak et al. (adj.)"),
  pHALAEEMPAUASRange |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Kawai et al."),
  pHALAENLRUASRangeAdj |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Aalmoes et al. (adj.)")
)

```

# Change in mean annoyance rating - Parts A & B combined analysis

```{r}

cv_seed <- 9999

```

## Categorical variables

### fit logistic models: ordbeta glmmTMB and GEE fractional logit

#### model 1 formula

```{r}

m1formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType +
                   (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) | ID)

# extract only fixed effects from m1formula
m1bformula <- update(m1formula, . ~ . - (1 + AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) | ID))


# include personal factors
m1cformula <- update(m1bformula, . ~ . +
                     NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                     Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2)

# exclude SessionPart
m1dformula <- update(m1bformula, . ~ . - SessionPart)

m1Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m1formula)), drop=FALSE]
m1cData <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m1cformula)), drop=FALSE]

```

#### run model

##### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m1bformula, data=m1Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m1cformula, data=m1cData, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m1dformula, data=m1Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)


```

```{r}

set.seed(999)
m1 <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(formula=m1formula, dispformula= ~ 1 + AmbientEnv, data=m1Data,
                       family=ordbeta(link='logit'),
                       control=glmmTMBctrl)

parameters::model_parameters(m1, ci=95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='robust', verbose=TRUE)

m1b <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m1bformula, data=m1Data,
                          id=ID, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='exchangeable')

m1c <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m1cformula, data=m1cData,
                          id=ID, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='exchangeable')

m1d <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m1dformula, data=m1Data,
                          id=ID, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m1b, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m1c, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m1d, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)


```

#### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m1b, m1c, m1d)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m1Data))
ndc <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m1cData))

me_predict_fn <- function(fit, newdata) {
  marginaleffects::predictions(fit, newdata=newdata, re.form=NA,
                                type="response",
                               allow.new.levels=TRUE,
                               vcov = FALSE)$estimate
}

m1_cv <- cv_glmmTMB(m1, K=10, id_col='ID', seed=cv_seed, workers=n_cores,
                   control=glmmTMBctrl,
                   backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                       direction="reverse",
                                                       squeeze="none"),
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                predict_fn=me_predict_fn,
                                agg_cols='StimID', data=nd) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

m1b_cv <- cv_glmgee(m1b, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                      direction="reverse",
                                                                      squeeze="none"),
                                workers=n_cores) |>

          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))


m1c_cv <- cv_glmgee(m1c, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=ndc, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                      direction="reverse",
                                                                      squeeze="none"),
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

m1d_cv <- cv_glmgee(m1d, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                      direction="reverse",
                                                                      squeeze="none"),
                                workers=n_cores) |>

          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

compare_cv_results(list(m1=m1_cv, m1b=m1b_cv, m1c=m1c_cv, m1d=m1d_cv))

```

#### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m1Data))

m1dpredMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m1d, newdata=nd,
                                                  by=c("StimID",
                                                       "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents", "UASType",
                                                       "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m1d, type='bias-corrected'),
                                                 type='response',
                                                transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                             direction='reverse',
                                                                             squeeze='none')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - m1dpredMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m1dpredMeans,
                     measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m1dpredMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3))), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModCal_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m1d.resP <- residuals(m1d, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                      pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(m1d, residual_vals=m1d.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

m1d.resM <- residuals(m1d, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m1d,
                    clusterVar=m1d.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m1d.Cook <- cooks.distance(m1d, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m1d, clusterVar=m1d.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m1d)

```

#### test model interactions

##### stepwise back removal of variables

```{r}

modelStep <- glmtoolbox::stepCriterion(model=m1d,
                                       criterion='agpc', test='score',
                                       direction='backward',
                                       varest='bias-corrected')

m1dformula
modelStep$final

```

##### test correlation structure for reduced interaction model

```{r}

m1eformula <- update(m1dformula, . ~ . - UASLAEMaxLRScl:UASType - AmbientEnv:UASType)

geeCorStr(m1eformula, data=m1Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)
 

```

##### cross-validate reduced model

```{r}

m1e <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m1eformula, data=m1Data,
                          id=ID, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='exchangeable')

geeModelPerformance(m1b, m1c, m1d, m1e)

m1e_cv <- cv_glmgee(m1e, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                      direction="reverse",
                                                                      squeeze="none"),
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

compare_cv_results(list(m1=m1_cv, m1b=m1b_cv, m1c=m1c_cv, m1d=m1d_cv, m1e=m1e_cv))

```

##### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m1Data))

m1epredMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m1e, newdata=nd,
                                                  by=c("StimID",
                                                       "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents", "UASType",
                                                       "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m1e, type='bias-corrected'),
                                                 type='response',
                                                transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                             direction='reverse',
                                                                             squeeze='none')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - m1epredMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m1epredMeans,
                     measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m1epredMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3))), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModRdCal_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}
```

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
```

#### analyse population-average predictions

```{r}

m1dDataFit <- insight::get_data(m1d)
m1dpredType <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m1d, newdata=subset(m1dDataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                    variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                  by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASType",
                                                       "AmbientEnv",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m1d, type="bias-corrected"),
                                                  transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                               direction='reverse',
                                                                               squeeze='none'))

m1dpredOp <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m1d, newdata=subset(m1dDataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                           "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv",
                                                           "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(m1d, type="bias-corrected"),
                                                  transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                               direction='reverse',
                                                                               squeeze='none'))

m1dpredEnv <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m1d, , newdata=subset(m1dDataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                           "AmbientEnv",
                                                           "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(m1d, type="bias-corrected"),
                                                  transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                               direction='reverse',
                                                                               squeeze='none'))

m1dpredEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m1d, newdata=subset(m1dDataFit,
                                                                 AmbientEnv=="Park" &
                                                                 UASOperation=="Overflight"),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                           "UASEvents",
                                                           "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(m1d, type="bias-corrected"),
                                                  transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                               direction='reverse',
                                                                               squeeze='none'))

m1dpredEvt2 <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m1d, newdata=subset(m1dDataFit,
                                                                 AmbientEnv=="Park" &
                                                                 UASOperation=="Overflight"),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12), UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                           "UASEvents",
                                                           "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(m1d, type="bias-corrected"),
                                                  transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                               direction='reverse',
                                                                               squeeze='none'))

```

#### visualise plots of PA effects

```{r}

p1 <- ggplot(data=subset(m1dpredType, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASType, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p2 <- ggplot(data=subset(m1dpredOp, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=UASOperation, shape=UASOperation),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASOperation),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASOperation), linewidth=1) +
              
              # Include the guide arguments directly inside the scale functions
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide = guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide = guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(9, 6, 2),
                                 guide = guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p3 <- ggplot(data=subset(m1dpredEnv, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                                                 colour=AmbientEnv, shape=AmbientEnv),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AmbientEnv),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AmbientEnv), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(1, 3), guide=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(y="Mean change in annoyance")

p4 <- ggplot(data=subset(m1dpredEvt, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight')) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight'),
                         aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASEvents)),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASEvents)), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatMod_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# add faint dashed grey major grid lines to p1, p2, p3, p4 and remove minor grid lines and point data
p1b <- p1 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p1b, "GeomPoint")
p2b <- p2 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p2b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p2b, "GeomPoint")
p3b <- p3 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p3b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p3b, "GeomPoint")
p4b <- p4 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p4b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p4b, "GeomPoint")

(p1b | p2b) + (p3b / p4b)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModGrid_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

p3c <- p3 + theme(axis.title.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                  axis.text.x=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                  axis.ticks.x=element_line(colour="black", linewidth=1)) + 
        labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)))

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEnv_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

p5 <- ggplot(data=subset(m1dpredEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park")) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.8,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &
                                       UASOperation=='Overflight' & SessionPart=='B'),
                         aes(x=UASEvents, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=UASLAEMaxLR, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
  
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79),
                                  guide=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_line(aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +

              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0),
                                  guide=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0),
                                 guide=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +

              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(2, 7)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")

p5

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnCatModEvt2_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```

## UAS info only

### LAE, events and trial sequence comparison model

#### model 2 formula

```{r}

m2formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents))

m2Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m2formula)), drop=FALSE]

```

#### run model

##### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m2formula, data=m1Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
           id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}

m2 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m2formula, data=m2Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m2, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

```

#### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m2)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m2Data))

m2_cv <- cv_glmgee(m2, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                      direction="reverse",
                                                                      squeeze="none"),
                                workers=n_cores) |>

          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

compare_cv_results(list(m1d=m1d_cv, m2=m2_cv))

```

#### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m2Data))

m2predMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m2, newdata=nd,
                                                  by=c("StimID",
                                                       "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m2, type='bias-corrected'),
                                                 type='response',
                                                transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                             direction='reverse',
                                                                             squeeze='none')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - m2predMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m2predMeans,
                     measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m2predMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3))), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnLAEModCal_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m2.resP <- residuals(m2, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                      pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(m2, residual_vals=m2.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

m2.resM <- residuals(m2, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m2,
                    clusterVar=m2.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m2.Cook <- cooks.distance(m2, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m2, clusterVar=m2.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m2)

```

#### export the model

```{r}
# save the model
if (savedata) {
  filename = "dA_LAE_noEnv_Qb"
  saveRDS(m2, file=file.path(outDataPath, paste(filename, ".rds", sep="")))
  
}

```

### full SQ model

#### model 3 formula

```{r}

m3formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLR*UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR + UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR + UASFluctECMA10ExBin +
  UASRoughFZ05ExMaxLR

m3Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m3formula)), drop=FALSE]

m3aformula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin*UASSharpAurISO305ExMaxLR + UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR + UASFluctECMA10ExBin +
  UASRoughFZ05ExMaxLR

m3aData <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m3aformula)), drop=FALSE]

```

#### run model

##### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m3formula, data=m3Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
           id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)


geeCorStr(m3aformula, data=m3Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
           id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}

m3 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m3formula, data=m3Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

m3a <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m3aformula, data=m3aData,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m3, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m3a, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)


```

#### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m3, m3a)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m3Data))
nda <-  na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m3aData))

m3_cv <- cv_glmgee(m3, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                      direction="reverse",
                                                                      squeeze="none"),
                                workers=n_cores) |>

          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

m3a_cv <- cv_glmgee(m3a, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nda, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                      direction="reverse",
                                                                      squeeze="none"),
                                workers=n_cores) |>

          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

compare_cv_results(list(m1d=m1d_cv, m2=m2_cv, m3=m3_cv, m3a=m3a_cv))

```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m3.resP <- residuals(m3, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                      pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(m3, residual_vals=m3.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

m3.resM <- residuals(m3, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m3,
                    clusterVar=m3.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m3.Cook <- cooks.distance(m3, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m3, clusterVar=m3.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m3)

```

#### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m3Data))

m3predMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m3, newdata=nd,
                                                  by=c("StimID",
                                                       "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m3, type='bias-corrected'),
                                                 type='response',
                                                transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                             direction='reverse',
                                                                             squeeze='none')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - m3predMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m3predMeans,
                     measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m3predMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3))), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnLAESQCal_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### test model interactions

##### stepwise back removal of variables

```{r}

modelStep <- glmtoolbox::stepCriterion(model=m3,
                                       criterion='agpc', test='score',
                                       direction='backward',
                                       varest='bias-corrected')

m3formula
modelStep$final

```

#### export the model

```{r}

# save the model
if (savedata) {
  filename = "dA_LAESQ_noEnv_Qb"
  saveRDS(m3, file=file.path(outDataPath, paste(filename, ".rds", sep="")))
  
}

```

#### regularised version of model with glmnet

```{r}

mf <- model.frame(m3formula, data = m3Data)      # na.omit happens here
kept_rows <- as.integer(rownames(mf))               # original row indices actually retained

y_matrix <- model.response(mf)
X_matrix <- model.matrix(m3formula, data=m3Data)[,-1]

StimID_kept <- m3bData$StimID[kept_rows]


stim_folds <- setNames(
  sample(rep(1:10, length.out = length(unique(StimID_kept)))),
  unique(StimID_kept)
)
foldid <- stim_folds[as.character(StimID_kept)]

stopifnot(length(foldid) == nrow(X_matrix), length(y_matrix) == nrow(X_matrix))


set.seed(808)
m3b <- glmnet::cv.glmnet(x=X_matrix, y=y_matrix, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         alpha=0.5, foldid=foldid, type.measure='deviance', standardize=TRUE,
                         lambda.min.ratio = 1e-7, nlambda = 200)

coef(m3b, s = "lambda.min")
coef(m3b, s = "lambda.1se")


```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

# 1. Turn the glmnet path data into a clean data frame
coefficient_paths <- broom::tidy(m3b$glmnet.fit, return_zeros=TRUE) |>
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)") # Exclude intercept to keep scale clean

# 3. Create the ggplot
ggplot(coefficient_paths, aes(x = lambda, y = estimate, color = term)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, alpha=0.6) +
  # Use your custom colour palette mycolours as colour scale
  scale_color_manual(values = mycolours) +
  scale_x_log10() + # Lambda spans orders of magnitude, log-scale is best
  # scale_y_log10() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = m3b$lambda.min, linetype = 'dotted', color = "grey", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = m3b$lambda.min*1.25, y = -max(coefficient_paths$estimate) * 0.55, 
           label = expression(paste("Minimum CV-error ",~lambda)), color = "grey", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = m3b$lambda.1se, linetype = 'dotted', color = "grey", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = m3b$lambda.1se*1.25, y = -max(coefficient_paths$estimate) * 0.55, 
           label = expression(paste("1SE from minimum CV-error ",~lambda)), color = "grey", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5) +
  labs(x = expression(log[10]*(lambda)),
      y = "Coefficient estimate",
      color = "Predictors"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio=1,
        text = element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
```
