```{r}
                                                       "Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m10c, type='bias-corrected'),
                                                 type='response',
                                                transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                             direction='reverse',
                                                                             squeeze='none')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - m10cpredMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m10cpredMeans,
                     measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m10cpredMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3))), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnDetdSQnetCal_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

##### analyse population-average predictions

```{r}

m10cDataFit <- insight::get_data(m10c)
m10cpredEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m10c, m10cDataFit,
                                                    variables = list(Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
```

##### visualise predictions

```{r}

              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),

              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb,

                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASEvents)),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASEvents)), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl,
                             stimDataNoAmb$Detect0p5dBIntMaxLRScl, sep=7) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(d*"'")[Sigma*0.5*s],",",~dB~re.~1)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnDetdSQModEvt_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}
```

## UAS all metrics


#### model 11 formula

```{r}

m11formula <- dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ TrialNumberScl +
  I(exp(0.03*LAELAF50diffScl)) +
  I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  dTonalSHMIntAvgMaxLR*dSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLR +
  dImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR + dFluctECMA10ExBin +
  dRoughFZ05ExMaxLR

m11Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m11formula)), drop=FALSE]

```

#### run model

##### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m11formula, data=m11Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
           id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}

m11 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m11formula, data=m11Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m11, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m11.resP <- residuals(m11, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                      pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(m11, residual_vals=m11.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

m11.resM <- residuals(m11, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m11,
                    clusterVar=m11.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m11.Cook <- cooks.distance(m11, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m11, clusterVar=m11.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m11)

```

#### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m1d, m2, m3, m3c, m4, m5, m6, m7,
                    m8, m9, m10, m10c, m11)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m11Data))

m11_cv <- cv_glmgee(m11, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                  data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                  return_predictions=TRUE,
                  backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                        direction="reverse",
                                                        squeeze="none"),
                  workers=n_cores) |>

          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

compare_cv_results(list(m1d=m1d_cv, m2=m2_cv, m3=m3_cv, m3c=m3c_cv, m4=m4_cv, m5=m5_cv,
                        m6=m6_cv, m7=m7_cv, m8=m8_cv, m9=m9_cv, m10=m10_cv,
                        m10c=m10c_cv, m11=m11_cv))

```

#### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m11Data))
m11predMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m11, newdata=nd,
                                                  by=c("StimID",
                                                       "LAELAF50diffScl",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m11, type='bias-corrected'),
                                                 type='response',
                                                transform=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                                             direction='reverse',
                                                                             squeeze='none')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - m11predMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m11predMeans,
                     measured_target='dAnnoyMean', measured_ci_low='dAnnoyMeanCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m11predMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMeanCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +

  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
    
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-2, 10, by=1), limits=c(-1, 9)) +
  
  labs(x="Mean change in annoyance (test)", y="Predicted mean change in annoyance") +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6.75, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3))), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnAllSQCal_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

#### test model interactions

##### stepwise back removal of variables

```{r}

modelStep <- glmtoolbox::stepCriterion(model=m11,
                                       criterion='agpc', test='score',
                                       direction='backward',
                                       varest='bias-corrected')

m11formula
modelStep$final

```

#### regularised version of model with glmnet

```{r}

mf <- model.frame(m11formula, data = m11Data)      # na.omit happens here
kept_rows <- as.integer(rownames(mf))               # original row indices actually retained

y_matrix <- model.response(mf)
X_matrix <- model.matrix(m11formula, data=m11Data)[,-1]

StimID_kept <- m11Data$StimID[kept_rows]

stim_folds <- setNames(
  sample(rep(1:10, length.out = length(unique(StimID_kept)))),
  unique(StimID_kept)
)
foldid <- stim_folds[as.character(StimID_kept)]

stopifnot(length(foldid) == nrow(X_matrix), length(y_matrix) == nrow(X_matrix))


set.seed(808)
m11b <- glmnet::cv.glmnet(x=X_matrix, y=y_matrix, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         alpha=0.5, foldid=foldid, type.measure='deviance',
                         standardize=TRUE, lambda.min.ratio = 1e-100, nlambda = 500)

coef(m11b, s = "lambda.min")
coef(m11b, s = "lambda.1se")

```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

# 1. Turn the glmnet path data into a clean data frame
coefficient_paths <- broom::tidy(m11b$glmnet.fit, return_zeros=TRUE) |>
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)") # Exclude intercept to keep scale clean

# 3. Create the ggplot
ggplot(coefficient_paths, aes(x = lambda, y = estimate, color = term)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, alpha=0.6) +
  # Use your custom colour palette mycolours as colour scale
  scale_color_manual(values = mycolours) +
  scale_x_log10() + # Lambda spans orders of magnitude, log-scale is best
  # scale_y_log10() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = m11b$lambda.min, linetype = 'dotted', color = "grey", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = m11b$lambda.min*1.25, y = max(coefficient_paths$estimate) * 0.5, 
           label = expression(paste("Minimum CV-error ",~lambda)), color = "grey", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = m11b$lambda.1se, linetype = 'dotted', color = "grey", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = m11b$lambda.1se*1.25, y = max(coefficient_paths$estimate) * 0.5, 
           label = expression(paste("1SE from minimum CV-error ",~lambda)), color = "grey", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5) +
  labs(x = expression(log[10]*(lambda)),
      y = "Coefficient estimate",
      color = "Predictors"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio=1,
        text = element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
        legend.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        legend.position='right')

  
filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMDetSQ_glmnetQb"
 
if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=10, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=10, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```

##### fit elastic net-informed model

###### formula

```{r}

m11cformula <- update(m11formula, . ~ . - dFluctECMA10ExBin)

```

###### run model

####### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m11cformula, data=m11Data, family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
           id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```


```{r}

m11c <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m11cformula, data=m11Data,
                          family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                          id=ID,
                          corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m11c, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)


```

###### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m11c.resP <- residuals(m11c, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE,
                      pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

gee_residplot(m11c, residual_vals=m11c.resP,
              colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.3) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4, text=element_text (family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Fitted values", y="Standardised Pearson residuals")

m11c.resM <- residuals(m11c, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m11c,
                    clusterVar=m11c.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m11c.Cook <- cooks.distance(m11c, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m11c, clusterVar=m11c.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m11c)

```

###### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m1d, m2, m3, m3c, m4, m5, m6, m7, m8, m9, m10, m10c,
                    m11, m11c)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m11Data))
m11c_cv <- cv_glmgee(m11c, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                    data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                    return_predictions=TRUE,
                    backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                                          direction="reverse",
                                                          squeeze="none"),
                    workers=n_cores) |>

          cv_aggregated_metrics(backtransform_fn=\(x) betaTransform(x, -10, 10,
                                "reverse", squeeze="none"))

compare_cv_results(list(m1d=m1d_cv, m2=m2_cv, m3=m3_cv, m3c=m3c_cv, m4=m4_cv, m5=m5_cv,
                        m6=m6_cv, m7=m7_cv, m8=m8_cv, m9=m9_cv,
                        m10=m10_cv, m10c=m10c_cv, m11=m11_cv, m11c=m11c_cv))

```

```{r}

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m11Data))
m11cpredMeans <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m11c, newdata=nd,
                                                  by=c("StimID",
                                                       "LAELAF50diffScl",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m11c, type='bias-corrected'),

                                                                             squeeze='none')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m11cpredMeans,

                     measured_ci_high='dAnnoyMeanCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m11cpredMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dAnnoyMean,

  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.1, y=6, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$rmse, 3))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.1, y = 5.25, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.3f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse, 3))), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnAllSQnetCal_geeQb"

if (saveplots){
```

```{r}
m11cDataFit <- insight::get_data(m11c)
m11cpredEvt <- marginaleffects::avg_predictions(m11c, m11cDataFit,
```

##### visualise predictions

```{r}

ggplot(data=m11cpredEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb,
                         aes(x=LAELAF50diffScl, y=dAnnoyMean,
                             colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=LAELAF50diffScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASEvents)),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=LAELAF50diffScl, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASEvents)), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$LAELAF50diffScl,
                             stimDataNoAmb$LAELAF50diffScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-10, 10, by=1), limits=c(-2, 8)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(d*"'")[Sigma*0.5*s],",",~dB~re.~1)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyMnAllSQnetModEvt_geeQb"

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}
```

## Comparison between GEE-LM (PA) and LMM (CS) models with LAE predictor

### Timing comparison

```{r}

set.seed(808)

# benchmark timing
testdAm <- microbenchmark::microbenchmark(
  
    'LMM_model' = {m0LMM <- lme4::lmer(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1)
                                              + TrialNumberScl +
                                             (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl  + I(UASEvents^-1) | ID),
                                                  data=subjDataNoAmb, REML=FALSE,
                                           control=lmerctrl)},
    
    'GEE-LM_model' = {m0GEELM <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1)
                                              + TrialNumberScl,
                                                data=subjDataNoAmb, family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                                id=ID, corstr='exchangeable')},
    
    'LMM_metrics' = {performance::model_performance(m0LMM, metrics=c("AIC", "AICc",
                                                                     "BIC", "R2"),
                                                       estimator='ML', verbose=FALSE)},
    
    'GEE-LM_metrics' = {geeModelPerformance(m0GEELM, verbose=FALSE)},
    
    'LMM_prediction' = {m0LMMpred <- ggeffects::predict_response(m0LMM,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [all]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='marginalmeans',
                                                       bias_correction=FALSE)},
    
    'GEE-LM_prediction' = {m0GEELMpred <- ggeffects::predict_response(m0GEELM,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [all]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='marginalmeans',
                                                      vcov=vcov(m0GEELM, type="bias-corrected"))},
    times=10, unit='s', control=list(order='inorder'))

testdAm

lmmVsGEEdAm <- data.frame(model=summary(testdAm)[1,]$median/summary(testdAm)[2,]$median,
                          metrics=summary(testdAm)[3,]$median/summary(testdAm)[4,]$median,
                          pred=summary(testdAm)[5,]$median/summary(testdAm)[6,]$median,
                          total=sum(summary(testdAm)[1,]$median, summary(testdAm)[3,]$median, summary(testdAm)[5,]$median)/
                                sum(summary(testdAm)[2,]$median, summary(testdAm)[4,]$median, summary(testdAm)[6,]$median))

print(paste("Model:", lmmVsGEEdAm$model))
print(paste("Metrics:", lmmVsGEEdAm$metrics))
print(paste("Prediction:", lmmVsGEEdAm$pred))
print(paste("Total:", lmmVsGEEdAm$total))

microbenchmark:::autoplot.microbenchmark(testdAm)
microbenchmark:::boxplot.microbenchmark(testdAm)


```

### Plot comparison

```{r}

set.seed(808)

mLMM <- lme4::lmer(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                             TrialNumberScl + (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) | ID),
                            data=subjDataNoAmb, control=lmerctrl)

mGEELM <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyance ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                                 TrialNumberScl,
                                  data=subjDataNoAmb, REML=FALSE,
                               family=gaussian(link='identity'),
                                  id=ID, corstr='exchangeable')

performance::model_performance(mLMM, metrics=c("AIC", "AICc", "BIC", "R2"), estimator='ML')

geeModelPerformance(mGEELM)

mABLAE1_QSq.LAEpred <- ggeffects::predict_response(mLMM,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                      type='fixed',
                                                       margin='mean_mode',
                                                       bias_correction=FALSE)

mABLAE1_QSq.GEEpred <- ggeffects::predict_response(mGEELM,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='empirical',
                                                      vcov=vcov(mGEELM, type="bias-corrected"))

mABLAE1_QSq.LAEpredAll <- ggeffects::predict_response(mLMM,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                              "ID [all]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='random',
                                                       bias_correction=FALSE)

p <- ggplot() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
        text = element_text(family = "serif"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), "cm"),
        axis.text=(element_text(family = "serif", size=11)))


for (id in unique(mABLAE1_QSq.LAEpredAll$group)){
  p <- p + geom_line(data=mABLAE1_QSq.LAEpredAll[mABLAE1_QSq.LAEpredAll$group==id,],
                     mapping=aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour="LMM (CS)"),
                     alpha=0.1, linewidth=0.25)
}

p <- p + 
  
  geom_ribbon(data=mABLAE1_QSq.LAEpred, mapping=aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high,
                                                      colour="LMM (CS)"),
              linetype=3, linewidth=0.55, alpha=0.5, fill=NA) +
  
  geom_ribbon(data=mABLAE1_QSq.GEEpred, mapping=aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high,
                                                      colour="GEE-LM (PA)"),
              linetype=4, linewidth=0.55, alpha=0.5, fill=NA) +
  
  geom_line(data=mABLAE1_QSq.LAEpred, mapping=aes(x=x, y=predicted,
                                                      colour="LMM (CS)"),
            linewidth=1, alpha=0.75) +
  
  geom_line(data=mABLAE1_QSq.GEEpred, aes(x=x, y=predicted,
                                             colour="GEE-LM (PA)"),
            linewidth=1, linetype=2, alpha=0.75) +
  
  rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                 stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-3, 8, by=1)) +
  
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("LMM (CS)"=mycolours[1], "GEE-LM (PA)"=mycolours[5])) +

  guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Method", reverse=TRUE),
         fill=guide_legend(title="Method", reverse=TRUE)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p

filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyLMMVsGEELM"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

## Comparison between GEE-GLM_Qb (PA) and GLMM_Ob (CS) models with LAE predictor

### Plot comparison

```{r}

set.seed(808)

UASLAEMaxLRDummy <- seq(-12, 33, by=1) + (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                            max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl))

newData <- data.frame(UASLAEMaxLR=UASLAEMaxLRDummy,
                      UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(-12, 33, by=1), UASEvents=1,
                      TrialNumberScl=0)

mGLMM_Ob <- glmmTMB::glmmTMB(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                             TrialNumberScl + (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) | ID),
                            data=subjDataNoAmb, family=ordbeta(link='logit'), control=glmmTMBctrl)

mGEEGLM_Qb <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dAnnoyanceOrdBetaScl ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                                 TrialNumberScl,
                                  data=subjDataNoAmb, REML=FALSE,
                               family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                                  id=ID, corstr='exchangeable')

mGLMM_Ob.LAEpred <- modelbased::estimate_prediction(mGLMM_Ob,
                                              data = newData,
                                              predict = "expectation",
                                              ci = 0.95,
                                              transform = TRUE,
                                              keep_iterations = FALSE,
                                              ci_method='wald') |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(Predicted, CI_low, CI_high),
                ~betaTransform(.x, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none')))

mGEEGLM_Qb.LAEpred <- ggeffects::predict_response(mGEEGLM_Qb, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:33]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='empirical',
                                                      vcov=vcov(mGEEGLM_Qb, type="bias-corrected")) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(predicted, conf.low, conf.high),
                ~betaTransform(.x, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none')))

mGLMM_Ob.LAE1_Qmarginal <- ggeffects::predict_response(mGLMM_Ob,
                                                       terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:33]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='empirical',
                                                       bias_correction=TRUE) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(predicted, conf.low, conf.high),
                ~betaTransform(.x, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none')))

mGLMM_Ob.LAE1_QpredAll <- ggeffects::predict_response(mGLMM_Ob,
                                                terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:33]",
                                                        "ID [all]",
                                                        "UASEvents [1]",
                                                        "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                             type='random',
                                             bias_correction=TRUE) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  dplyr::mutate(dplyr::across(c(predicted, conf.low, conf.high),
                ~betaTransform(.x, -10, 10, direction='reverse', squeeze='none')))

p <- ggplot() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
        text = element_text(family = "serif"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), "cm"),
        axis.text=(element_text(family = "serif", size=11)))


for (id in unique(mGLMM_Ob.LAE1_QpredAll$group)){
  p <- p + geom_line(data=mGLMM_Ob.LAE1_QpredAll[mGLMM_Ob.LAE1_QpredAll$group==id,],
                     mapping=aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour="GLMM (CS)"),
                     alpha=0.1, linewidth=0.25)
}

p1 <- p + 

  geom_ribbon(data=mGLMM_Ob.LAEpred, mapping=aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=CI_low, ymax=CI_high,
                                                      colour="GLMM (CS)"),
              linetype=3, linewidth=0.55, alpha=0.5, fill=NA) +
  
  geom_ribbon(data=mGEEGLM_Qb.LAEpred, mapping=aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high,
                                                      colour="GEE-GLM (PA)"),
              linetype=4, linewidth=0.55, alpha=0.5, fill=NA) +
  
  geom_line(data=mGLMM_Ob.LAEpred, mapping=aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=Predicted,
                                                      colour="GLMM (CS)"),
            linewidth=1, alpha=0.75) +
  
  geom_line(data=mGEEGLM_Qb.LAEpred, aes(x=x, y=predicted,
                                             colour="GEE-GLM (PA)"),
            linewidth=1, linetype=5, alpha=0.75) +
  
  geom_line(data=mGLMM_Ob.LAE1_Qmarginal, mapping=aes(x=x, y=predicted,
                                                      colour="GLMM (PA)"),
              linetype=2, linewidth=1, alpha=0.75) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-12, 33, by=5), labels=seq(55, 100, by=5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(-3, 8, by=1)) +
  
  scale_colour_manual(values=c("GLMM (CS)"=mycolours[2],
                                 "GEE-GLM (PA)"=mycolours[6],
                                "GLMM (PA)"=mycolours[7]),
                        breaks=c("GLMM (PA)",
                                 "GEE-GLM (PA)",
                                 "GLMM (CS)")) +

  guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Method", reverse=TRUE),
         fill=guide_legend(title="Method", reverse=TRUE)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

p1


filename <- "PtsABdAnnoyGLMM_ObVsGEEGLM_Qb"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

# Change in highly annoyed

## Categorical variables

### model 12 formula

```{r}

m12formula <- dHighAnnoy ~ 1 + SessionPart + TrialNumberScl +
                    UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbientEnv*UASOperation +
                   UASLAEMaxLRScl*UASType +
                   AmbientEnv*UASType

m12Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m12formula)), drop=FALSE]

m12bformula <- update(m12formula, . ~ . +
                        NationGeo2 + AAM_attitude2 + Home_Area2 +
                      Age + Sex + NSSTotal + Area_soundscape2)

m12bData <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m12bformula)), drop=FALSE]

m12cformula <- update(m12formula, . ~ . +
                        Home_Area2 +
                      Sex)

m12dformula <- update(m12formula, . ~ . - SessionPart)

m12eformula <- update(m12formula, . ~ . - UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)))

```

### run model

#### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m12formula, data=m12Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m12bformula, data=m12bData, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m12cformula, data=m12bData, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m12dformula, data=m12Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m12eformula, data=m12Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                 id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}


m12 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12formula, data=m12Data,
                          id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='exchangeable')

m12_ind <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12formula, data=m12Data,
                          id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='independence')

m12b <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12bformula, data=m12bData,
                          id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='independence')

m12b_exch <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12bformula, data=m12bData,
                          id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='exchangeable')

m12c <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12cformula, data=m12bData,
                          id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='exchangeable')

m12c_ind <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12cformula, data=m12bData,
                          id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                          corstr='independence')

m12d <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12dformula, data=m12Data,
                           id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                           corstr='exchangeable')

m12e <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(formula=m12eformula, data=m12Data,
                           id=ID, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                           corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m12, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m12b, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m12c, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m12d, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m12e, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)


```

### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m12, m12b, m12c, m12d, m12e)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m12Data))
ndb <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m12bData))

m12_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                      data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                      return_predictions=TRUE,
                      workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m12_ind_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12_ind, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                      data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                      return_predictions=TRUE,
                      workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m12b_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12b, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m12b_exch_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12b_exch, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m12c_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12c, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                      data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                      return_predictions=TRUE,
                      workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m12c_ind_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12c_ind, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                      data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                      return_predictions=TRUE,
                      workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m12d_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12d, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                      data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                      return_predictions=TRUE,
                      workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m12e_cv <- cv_glmgee(m12e, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                      data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                      return_predictions=TRUE,
                      workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

compare_cv_results(list(m12=m12_cv, m12b=m12b_cv,
                        m12_ind=m12_ind_cv, m12b_exch=m12b_exch_cv,
                        m12c=m12c_cv, m12c_ind=m12c_ind_cv,
                        m12d=m12d_cv, m12e=m12e_cv))

```

### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m12.resP <- residuals(m12, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE)

used <- complete.cases(m12Data[all.vars(m12formula)])

arm::binnedplot(fitted(m12), m12.resP)
arm::binnedplot(m12Data$UASLAEMaxLRScl[used], residuals(m12, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASLAEMaxLRScl")
arm::binnedplot(m12Data$UASEvents[used], residuals(m12, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASEvents")
arm::binnedplot(m12Data$TrialNumberScl[used], residuals(m12, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "TrialNumberScl")

m12.resM <- residuals(m12, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m12,
                    clusterVar=m12.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m12.Cook <- cooks.distance(m12, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m12, clusterVar=m12.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m12)

```

### test model interactions

#### stepwise back removal of variables

```{r}

modelStep <- glmtoolbox::stepCriterion(model=m12,
                                       criterion='agpc', test='score',
                                       direction='backward',
                                       varest='bias-corrected')

m12formula
modelStep$final

```

### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m12Data))

m12predMeans <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12, newdata=nd,
                                      by=c("StimID",
                                           "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                           "UASEvents", "UASType",
                                           "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                      vcov=vcov(m12, type='bias-corrected')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - m12predMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m12predMeans,
                     measured_target='dHighAnnoyProp', measured_ci_low='dHighAnnoyPropCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dHighAnnoyPropCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m12predMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyPropCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyPropCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +

  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]~"("~test~")")), y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]))) +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.6, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.55, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$rmse*100, 2)), "%"), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.01, y = 0.5, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse*100, 2)), "*'%'"), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyMnCatModCal_gee"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

### analyse population-average predictions

```{r}
m12DataFit <- insight::get_data(m12)
m12predType <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12, newdata=subset(m12DataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                    variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                  by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASType",
                                                       "AmbientEnv",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m12, type="bias-corrected"))

m12predType1 <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12, newdata=subset(m12DataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                    variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                  by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "UASType",
                                                       "UASEvents"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m12, type="bias-corrected"))

m12predOp <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12, newdata=subset(m12DataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                           "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv",
                                                           "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(m12, type="bias-corrected"))

m12predEnv <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12, newdata=subset(m12DataFit,
                                                             UASEvents==1),
                                                      variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                          min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                          length.out=25)),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                           "AmbientEnv",
                                                           "UASEvents"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(m12, type="bias-corrected"))

m12predEvt <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12, newdata=subset(m12DataFit, AmbientEnv=="Park" &
                                              UASOperation == "Overflight"),
                                              variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                length.out = 25)),
                                          by = c("UASLAEMaxLRScl", "UASEvents",
                                                 "UASOperation", "AmbientEnv"),
                                          vcov = vcov(m12, type = "bias-corrected"))

m12predEvt2 <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12, newdata=subset(m12DataFit,
                                                                 AmbientEnv=="Park" &
                                                                 UASOperation=="Overflight"),
                                                      variables=(list(UASLAEMaxLRScl = c(6, 12),
                                                                      UASType=c("H520", "T150"))),
                                                      by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                           "UASEvents",
                                                           "UASOperation",
                                                           "AmbientEnv"),
                                                      vcov=vcov(m12, type="bias-corrected"))

```

### visualise plots of PA effects

```{r}

p1 <- ggplot(data=subset(m12predType, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dHighAnnoyProp,
                                                 colour=UASType, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,

              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 1)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))


p1b <- ggplot(data=subset(m12predType, AmbientEnv=="Park" & UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12)) +

              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb[(stimDataNoAmb$UASEvents == 1) &

                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 1)) +

              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


p1c <- ggplot(data=subset(m12predType, AmbientEnv=="Park" & UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    legend.text=element_text(size=10)) +

              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASType), alpha=0.1) +

              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASType), linewidth=1) +

              scale_color_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE, order=1)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='plasma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE, order=1)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE, order=1)) +

              ggnewscale::new_scale_colour() +

              geom_line(data=pHALAENLR, aes(x=LAEScl, y=pHA, colour=UAS),
                        linetype=3, linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.9) +

              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Aalmoes et al.", reverse=FALSE, order=2)) +

              ggnewscale::new_scale_colour() +

              geom_line(data=pHALAEEMPA, aes(x=LAEScl, y=pHA, colour=UAS),
                        linetype=2, linewidth=1, alpha=0.9) +

              scale_colour_brewer(palette = "Set1") +

              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Kawai et al.", reverse=FALSE, order=3)) +

              rescaleTicks(pHALAENLR$LAE,
                             pHALAENLR$LAEScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 1)) +

              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed)))

p1c

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyCatTypeModCompAll2_gee"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=6, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


# send subset(m12predType1, UASEvents==1) to group_by to get min and max at each x (LAEScl) for geom_ribbon layers
m12predType1UASRange <- subset(m12predType1, UASEvents==1) |>
  group_by(UASLAEMaxLRScl) |>
  summarise(pHAmin = min(estimate),
            pHAmax = max(estimate),
            .groups = 'drop')

# incorporate m12predType1UASRange into pHALAEUASRangeAll with study 'Present study'
m12predType1UASRange <- m12predType1UASRange |>
  dplyr::mutate(LAE = UASLAEMaxLRScl  + stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR[1] - stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl[1],
                LAEScl = UASLAEMaxLRScl) |> dplyr::select(LAE, LAEScl, pHAmin, pHAmax)

pHALAEUASRangeAll <- rbind(pHALAEUASRangeAll,
                           m12predType1UASRange |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Present study")
)

# repeat for pHALAEUASRangeAllAdj
pHALAEUASRangeAllAdj <- rbind(pHALAEUASRangeAllAdj,
                              m12predType1UASRange |> dplyr::mutate(Study = "Present study")
)


p1h <- ggplot(data=m12predType1UASRange) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
                    legend.text=element_text(size=11),
                    legend.title=element_text(size=12),
                    legend.spacing.y=unit(0.1, 'cm')) +


              # use geom_ribbon to plot the range corresponding with the pHALAEUASRangeAll pHA data
              geom_ribbon(data=pHALAEUASRangeAll, aes(x=LAEScl, ymin=pHAmin, ymax=pHAmax,
                          fill=Study),
                          alpha=0.2) +

              guides(fill=guide_legend(title="UAS range", order=1)) +

              scale_fill_manual(values=c("Aalmoes et al."=mycolours[4],
                                         "Gwak et al."=mycolours[3],
                                         "Kawai et al."=mycolours[2],
                                         "Present study"=mycolours[1])) +

              geom_line(data=pHALAENLRAir, aes(x=LAEScl, y=pHA,
                        linetype=Type), colour=mycolours[4], size=1.25, alpha=0.6) +

              guides(linetype=guide_legend(title="Aalmoes et al. aircraft", reverse=FALSE, order=2, ncol=2)) +

              ggnewscale::new_scale('linetype') +

              geom_line(data=pHALAEGwakAir, aes(x=LAEScl, y=pHA, linetype=Type),
                        colour=mycolours[3], size=0.75, alpha=0.6) +

              guides(linetype=guide_legend(title="Gwak et al. aircraft", reverse=FALSE, order=3, ncol=2)) +

              ggnewscale::new_scale('linetype') +

              geom_line(data=pHALAEEMPAAir, aes(x=LAEScl, y=pHA, linetype=Type),
                        colour=mycolours[2], size=1, alpha=0.6) +

              guides(linetype=guide_legend(title="Kawai et al. aircraft", reverse=FALSE, order=4, ncol=2)) +

              rescaleTicks(pHALAEGwak$LAE, pHALAEGwak$LAEScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 1)) +

              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed)))

p1h

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=6.25, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

p2 <- ggplot(data=subset(m12predOp, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dHighAnnoyProp,
                                                 colour=UASOperation, shape=UASOperation),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=UASOperation),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=UASOperation), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='mako', discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(9, 6, 2), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS operation", reverse=TRUE)) +
              
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(-0.02, 1)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance") +
              facet_grid(rows = vars(AmbientEnv))

p3 <- ggplot(data=subset(m12predEnv, UASEvents==1)) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
                    axis.title.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.text.x=element_blank(),
                    axis.ticks.x=element_blank()) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, UASEvents==1), aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dHighAnnoyProp,
                                                 colour=AmbientEnv, shape=AmbientEnv),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AmbientEnv),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AmbientEnv), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='magma', direction=-1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.7,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(1, 3), guide=guide_legend(title="Amb. env.", reverse=FALSE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(-0.02, 1)) +
              
              labs(y="Mean change in annoyance")

p4 <- ggplot(data=subset(m12predEvt, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight')) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' & UASOperation=='Overflight'),
                         aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dHighAnnoyProp,
                             colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASEvents)),
                          alpha=0.15) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASEvents)), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                 guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(-0.02, 1)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)), y="Mean change in annoyance")

(p1 | p2) + (p3 / p4)

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyMnCatMod_gee"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=15, height=8,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=15, height=8, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

# add faint dashed grey major grid lines to p1, p2, p3, p4 and remove minor grid lines and point data
p1b <- p1 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                  panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p1b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p1b, "GeomPoint")
p2b <- p2 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p2b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p2b, "GeomPoint")
p3b <- p3 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p3b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p3b, "GeomPoint")
p4b <- p4 + theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
p4b <- gginnards::delete_layers(p4b, "GeomPoint")

(p1b | p2b) + (p3b / p4b)

p5 <- ggplot(data=subset(m12predEvt2, UASOperation=="Overflight" & AmbientEnv=="Park")) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.8,
                    text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=subset(stimDataNoAmb, AmbientEnv=='Park' &
                                       UASOperation=='Overflight' & SessionPart=='B'),
                         aes(x=UASEvents, y=dHighAnnoyProp,
                             colour=UASLAEMaxLR, shape=UASType),
                         alpha=0.35, size=2) +
  
              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=FALSE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                  breaks=c(73, 79),
                                  guide=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
  
              ggnewscale::new_scale_color() +
  
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASEvents, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)),
                          alpha=0.05) +
  
              geom_line(aes(x=UASEvents, y=estimate, colour=factor(UASLAEMaxLRScl)), linewidth=1, alpha=0.5) +

              scale_color_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0),
                                  guide=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='inferno', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8,
                                   labels=function(x) format(round(as.numeric(x) +
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                                                   mean(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                                   0),
                                                             nsmall = 0),
                                 guide=guide_legend(title=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~","~dB)), reverse=TRUE)) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(10, 11, 12), guide=guide_legend(title="UAS type", reverse=FALSE)) +
  
              scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(1, 3, 5, 9), labels=c(1, 3, 5, 9)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, 10), limits=c(-0.02, 0.8)) +
              
              labs(x="Number of UAS Overflight events", y="Mean change in annoyance")
```

### personal factors model

#### population-average predictions

```{r}

m12bDataFit <- insight::get_data(m12b)
m12bpredAtt <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12b, newdata=m12bDataFit,
                                                    variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                  by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "AAM_attitude2"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m12b, type="bias-corrected"))

m12bpredAoR <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12b, newdata=m12bDataFit,
                                                    variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                  by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "Home_Area2"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m12b, type="bias-corrected"))

m12dpredAtt <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m12d, newdata=insight::get_data(m12d),
                                                    variables = list(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(
                                                      min(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl),
                                                      length.out=25)),
                                                  by=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                                       "AAM_attitude2"),
                                                  vcov=vcov(m12d, type="bias-corrected"))

```

#### visualise plots of PA effects

```{r}

ggplot(data=m12bpredAtt) +
              theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(alpha(colour = "grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
                 panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                    aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +

              geom_ribbon(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=AAM_attitude2), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=estimate, colour=AAM_attitude2), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="AAM attitude", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="AAM attitude", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 1)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)),
                   y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))
```
