## UAS info only

### LAE only with events

#### model 13 formula

```{r}

m13formula <- dHighAnnoy ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents))

m13Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m13formula)), drop=FALSE]

```

#### run model

##### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m13formula, data=m13Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
          id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}

m13 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m13formula, data=m13Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m13, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m13.resP <- residuals(m13, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE)

used <- complete.cases(m13Data[all.vars(m13formula)])

arm::binnedplot(fitted(m13), m13.resP)
arm::binnedplot(m13Data$UASLAEMaxLRScl[used], residuals(m13, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASLAEMaxLRScl")
arm::binnedplot(m13Data$UASEvents[used], residuals(m13, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASEvents")
arm::binnedplot(m13Data$TrialNumberScl[used], residuals(m13, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "TrialNumberScl")

m13.resM <- residuals(m13, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m13,
                    clusterVar=m13.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m13.Cook <- cooks.distance(m13, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m13, clusterVar=m13.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m13)

```

#### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m12, m13)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m13Data))

m13_cv <- cv_glmgee(m13, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

compare_cv_results(list(m12=m12_cv, m13=m13_cv))

```

#### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}
m13predMeans <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m13, newdata=nd,
                                      by=c("StimID",
                                           "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                           "UASEvents"),
                                      vcov=vcov(m13, type='bias-corrected')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - m13predMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m13predMeans,
                     measured_target='dHighAnnoyProp', measured_ci_low='dHighAnnoyPropCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dHighAnnoyPropCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m13predMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyPropCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyPropCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +

  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]~"("~test~")")), y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]))) +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.6, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.55, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$rmse*100, 2)), "%"), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.01, y = 0.5, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse*100, 2)), "*'%'"), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyMnLAEModCal_gee"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```

### full SQ model

#### model 14 formula

```{r}

m14formula <- dHighAnnoy ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBinScl*UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLRScl + UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR +
  UASFluctECMA10ExBin + UASRoughFZ05ExMaxLR

m14Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m14formula)), drop=FALSE]

m14bformula <- dHighAnnoy ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLRScl*UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLRScl + UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR +
  UASFluctECMA10ExBin + UASRoughFZ05ExMaxLR

m14bData <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m14bformula)), drop=FALSE]

m14cformula <- dHighAnnoy ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLRScl*UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLRScl + UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR +
  UASFluctECMA10ExBin + UASRoughFZ05ExMaxLR

```

#### run model

##### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m14formula, data=m14Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
          id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m14bformula, data=m14bData, family=binomial(link='logit'),
          id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m14cformula, data=m14bData, family=binomial(link='logit'),
          id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}

m14 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m14formula, data=m14Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

m14b <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m14bformula, data=m14bData,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

m14c <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m14cformula, data=m14bData,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m14, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m14b, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m14c, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)


```

#### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m12, m13, m14, m14b, m14c)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m14Data))
ndb <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m14bData))

m14_cv <- cv_glmgee(m14, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m14b_cv <- cv_glmgee(m14b, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

m14c_cv <- cv_glmgee(m14c, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=ndb, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

compare_cv_results(list(m12=m12_cv, m13=m13_cv, m14=m14_cv, m14b=m14b_cv,
                        m14c=m14c_cv))

```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m14b.resP <- residuals(m14b, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE)

used <- complete.cases(m14bData[all.vars(m14bformula)])

arm::binnedplot(fitted(m14b), m14b.resP)
arm::binnedplot(m14bData$UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl[used], residuals(m14b, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl")
arm::binnedplot(m14bData$UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR[used], residuals(m14b, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR")
arm::binnedplot(m14bData$UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLRScl[used], residuals(m14b, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLRScl")
arm::binnedplot(m14bData$UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLRScl[used], residuals(m14b, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLRScl")
arm::binnedplot(m14bData$UASEvents[used], residuals(m14b, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASEvents")
arm::binnedplot(m14bData$TrialNumberScl[used], residuals(m14b, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "TrialNumberScl")

m14b.resM <- residuals(m14b, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m14b,
                    clusterVar=m14b.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

m14b.Cook <- cooks.distance(m14b, plot.it=FALSE)

geeCluster_stemplot(m14b, clusterVar=m14b.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m14b)

```

### test model interactions

#### stepwise back removal of variables

```{r}

modelStep <- glmtoolbox::stepCriterion(model=m14b,
                                       criterion='agpc', test='score',
                                       direction='backward',
                                       varest='bias-corrected')

m14bformula
modelStep$final

```

### regularised version of model with glmnet

```{r}

mf <- model.frame(m14bformula, data = m14bData)      # na.omit happens here
kept_rows <- as.integer(rownames(mf))               # original row indices actually retained

y_matrix <- model.response(mf)
X_matrix <- model.matrix(m14bformula, data=m14bData)[,-1]

StimID_kept <- m14bData$StimID[kept_rows]

stim_folds <- setNames(
  sample(rep(1:10, length.out = length(unique(StimID_kept)))),
  unique(StimID_kept)
)
foldid <- stim_folds[as.character(StimID_kept)]

stopifnot(length(foldid) == nrow(X_matrix), length(y_matrix) == nrow(X_matrix))


set.seed(808)
m14d <- glmnet::cv.glmnet(x=X_matrix, y=y_matrix, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                          alpha=0.5, foldid=foldid, type.measure='deviance',
                          standardize=TRUE, lambda.min.ratio = 1e-20, nlambda = 500)

coef(m14d, s = "lambda.min")
coef(m14d, s = "lambda.1se")

```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=5}

# 1. Turn the glmnet path data into a clean data frame
coefficient_paths <- broom::tidy(m14d$glmnet.fit, return_zeros=TRUE) |>
  dplyr::filter(term != "(Intercept)") # Exclude intercept to keep scale clean

# 3. Create the ggplot
ggplot(coefficient_paths, aes(x = lambda, y = estimate, color = term)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 0.4, alpha=0.6) +
  # Use your custom colour palette mycolours as colour scale
  scale_color_manual(values = mycolours) +
  scale_x_log10() + # Lambda spans orders of magnitude, log-scale is best
  # scale_y_log10() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = m14d$lambda.min, linetype = 'dotted', color = "grey", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = m14d$lambda.min*1.25, y = max(coefficient_paths$estimate) * 0.5, 
           label = expression(paste("Minimum CV-error ",~lambda)), color = "grey", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = m14d$lambda.1se, linetype = 'dotted', color = "grey", linewidth = 0.8) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = m14d$lambda.1se*1.25, y = max(coefficient_paths$estimate) * 0.5, 
           label = expression(paste("1SE from minimum CV-error ",~lambda)), color = "grey", angle = 90, vjust = 0.5) +
  labs(x = expression(log[10]*(lambda)),
      y = "Coefficient estimate",
      color = "Predictors"
  ) +
  theme(panel.grid.major = element_line(colour = alpha("grey90", alpha=0.5), linetype='dashed'),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        aspect.ratio=1,
        text = element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14),
        legend.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        legend.position='right')

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyLAESQEnv_glmnetQb"
 
if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=10, height=5,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"), system_fonts = list('serif'="Times New Roman"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=10, height=5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```

### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}

ndb <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m14bData))

m14bpredMeans <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m14b, newdata=ndb,
                                      by=c("StimID",
                                           "UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl",
                                           "UASEvents"),
                                      vcov=vcov(m14b, type='bias-corrected')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - m14bpredMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m14bpredMeans,
                     measured_target='dHighAnnoyProp', measured_ci_low='dHighAnnoyPropCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dHighAnnoyPropCI_High', fitted='estimate')

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictMeans
ggplot(data=cbind(m14bpredMeans,
                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp,
                  responseCI_Low=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyPropCI_Low,
                  responseCI_High=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyPropCI_High)) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +

  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]~"("~test~")")), y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]))) +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.6, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.55, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$rmse*100, 2)), "%"), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.01, y = 0.5, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse*100, 2)), "*'%'"), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyMnLAESQModCal_gee"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

```

## with ambient env classification

### LAE, events, env and trial sequence only

#### model 15 formula

```{r}

m15formula <- dHighAnnoy ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLAEMaxLRScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  AmbientEnv

m15Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m14bformula)), drop=FALSE]

```

#### run model

```{r}
geeCorStr(m13formula, data=m13Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
          id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}

m13 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m13formula, data=m13Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m13, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

```

#### model diagnostics

```{r, fig.width=12, fig.height=4}}

m13.resP <- residuals(m13, type="pearson", plot.it=FALSE)

used <- complete.cases(m13Data[all.vars(m13formula)])

arm::binnedplot(fitted(m13), m13.resP)
arm::binnedplot(m13Data$UASLAEMaxLRScl[used], residuals(m13, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "UASLAEMaxLRScl")

                 xlab = "UASEvents")
arm::binnedplot(m13Data$TrialNumberScl[used], residuals(m13, type = "pearson"),
                 xlab = "TrialNumberScl")

m13.resM <- residuals(m13, type="mahalanobis", plot.it=FALSE)

# plot Mahalanobis residuals with ggplot2 on a stem plot replacing the index by the corresponding participant ID
geeCluster_stemplot(m13,
                    clusterVar=m13.resM,
                    colour=mycolours[2], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),

  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Mahalanobis distance")

geeCluster_stemplot(m13, clusterVar=m13.Cook,
                    colour=mycolours[4], alpha=0.7) +
    theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=0.4,
        text=element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  labs(x="Participant ID", y="Cook's distance")

glmgee_vif(m13)

```

#### analyse performance

```{r}

geeModelPerformance(m12, m13)

nd <- na.omit(cbind(StimID = subjDataNoAmb.med$StimID, m13Data))

m13_cv <- cv_glmgee(m13, id_col="ID", K=10, seed=cv_seed,
                                data=nd, agg_cols="StimID",
                                return_predictions=TRUE,
                                workers=n_cores) |>
          cv_aggregated_metrics()

compare_cv_results(list(m12=m12_cv, m13=m13_cv))

```

#### analyse and visualise calibration

```{r}
m13predMeans <- avg_predictions_hybrid(m13, newdata=nd,
                                      by=c("StimID",
                                           "UASLAEMaxLRScl",
                                           "UASEvents"),
                                      vcov=vcov(m13, type='bias-corrected')) |>
  dplyr::arrange(StimID)

R2means <- 1 - sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - m13predMeans$estimate)^2)/sum((stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp - mean(stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp))^2)

eRMSE <- epsilonRMSE(measured_data=stimDataNoAmb, predicted_data=m13predMeans,
                     measured_target='dHighAnnoyProp', measured_ci_low='dHighAnnoyPropCI_Low',
                     measured_ci_high='dHighAnnoyPropCI_High', fitted='estimate')

                  response=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp,

        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +

  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate), size=1.75, shape=4, stroke=0.75, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.5) +

  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, xmin=responseCI_Low, xmax=responseCI_High,
                            y=estimate), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +
  
  geom_errorbar(mapping=aes(x=response, y=estimate, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high), width=0, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.1) +

  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]~"("~test~")")), y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]))) +
  
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.6, label=deparse(bquote(italic(R)^2 == .(sprintf("%.3f", (round(R2means, 3)))))), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0, parse=TRUE) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x=0.01, y=0.55, label=paste0("RMSE = ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$rmse*100, 2)), "%"), family="serif", size=4, hjust = 0) +
  ggplot2::annotate("text", x = 0.01, y = 0.5, label = paste0("RMSE[epsilon] == ", sprintf("%.2f", round(eRMSE$epsilon_rmse*100, 2)), "*'%'"), 
  family = "serif", size = 4, hjust = 0, parse = TRUE)

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyMnLAEModCal_gee"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4, height=4, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))

}
```

### full SQ model

#### model 14 formula

```{r}

m15formula <- dHighAnnoy ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl*AmbientEnv + I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLRScl*UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLRScl + UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR +
  UASFluctECMA10ExBin + UASRoughFZ05ExMaxLR

m15Data <- subjDataNoAmb.med[, c(ID='ID', StimID='StimID', all.vars(m15formula)), drop=FALSE]

m15bformula <- dHighAnnoy ~ TrialNumberScl + UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl*AmbientEnv +
  UASLoudECMAPowAvgBinScl*I(log10(UASEvents)) +
  UASTonalAwSHMInt05ExMaxLRScl*UASSharpAurISO3PowAvgMaxLRScl + UASImpulsLoudWZAvgMaxLR +
  UASFluctECMA10ExBin + UASRoughFZ05ExMaxLR


```

#### run model

##### check correlation structure

```{r}

geeCorStr(m15formula, data=m15Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
          id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

geeCorStr(m15bformula, data=m15Data, family=binomial(link='logit'),
          id=ID, maxit=2e3, verbose=FALSE)

```

```{r}

m15 <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m15formula, data=m15Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

m15b <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(m15bformula, data=m15Data,
                         family=quasibinomial(link='logit'),
                         id=ID,
                         corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(m15, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(m15b, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

```

#

## with env class

### fit and examine final model

```{r}

model1 <- mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dHighAnnoy ~ UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin +
                                                               I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                                 UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin*AmbientEnv +
                               UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin*UASSharpAurSHM05ExMaxLR +
                                 UASImpulsSHMPowAvgMaxLR +
                                 TrialNumberScl,
                              data=subjDataNoAmb,
                              family=binomial(link='logit'),
                              id=ID,
                              corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABdHTypexOpxLAExEnvlgQxLAE.GEE, mABdHSxTnNlgQ.GEE,
                    mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE)

predictProbs <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2probs <- cor(predictProbs$response, predictProbs$fit)^2
R2probs

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictProbs
p0 <- ggplot(data=predictProbs) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[3], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]~"("~test~")")),
       y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))

p0

filename <- "PtsABdHiAnnoyEnvClsPred"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=3.5, height=3.5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))

  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=3.5, height=3.5, path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}

model1predictEnv <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [all]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))


model1predictEvt <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                                "UASEvents [all]",
                                                                "AmbientEnv [Park]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictNxS <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                               "UASSharpAurSHM05ExMaxLR [1.2:2.8, by=0.4]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictNxTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                                 "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [0.5:1.5, by=0.25]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictNxI <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                                 "UASImpulsSHMPowAvgMaxLR [0.15:0.35, by=0.05]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [all]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

p1 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb, aes(x=UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin, y=dHighAnnoyProp, colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.05) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), alpha=0.5, linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +

              scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(1, 6, by=1)) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), limits=c(0, 1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(N)^"*"~","~sone[SHM])),
                   y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))
```

### Model diagnostics

```{r}


mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.resD <- residuals(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE,
                                     type="deviance", plot.it=TRUE,
                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[1],identify=10)
mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.resM <- residuals(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE,
                                     type="mahalanobis", plot.it=TRUE,
                                     col=mycolours[2], identify=10)
mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.resP <- residuals(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE,
                                     type="pearson", plot.it=TRUE,
                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

hist(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.resD, breaks=20, main="Deviance residuals")
hist(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.resP, breaks=20, main="Pearson residuals")

par(mar = rep(2, 4))

mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.DfBc <- dfbeta(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE,
                                  level='clusters',
                                 coefs=c('UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin'))
mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.DfBo <- dfbeta(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE,
                                level='observations',
                               coefs=c('UASLoudECMAPowAvgBin'))

mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE.Cook <- cooks.distance(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE,
                                          plot.it=TRUE)

performance::check_collinearity(mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE)

```

## UAS-env loudness diff

### fit and examine final model

```{r}

model1 <- mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dHighAnnoy ~ I(log10(UASEvents)) + LAELAeqdiffScl +
                                                                   UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin*UASSharpAurSHM05ExMaxLR +
                                                                I(LAELAeqdiffScl^2) +
                                                                   TrialNumberScl,
                                                              data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                              family=binomial(link='logit'),
                                                              id=ID,
                                                              corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABdHTypexOpxLAExEnvlgQxLAE.GEE, mABdHSxTnNlgQ.GEE,
                    mABdHISxTnEnvxNlgQSq.GEE, mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE)

predictProbs <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2probs <- cor(predictProbs$response, predictProbs$fit)^2
R2probs

# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictProbs
ggplot(data=predictProbs) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.5)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]~"("~test~")")),
       y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))


model1predictEvt <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("LAELAeqdiffScl [all]",
                                                                "UASEvents [all]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictLxS <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("LAELAeqdiffScl [all]",
                                                               "UASSharpAurSHM05ExMaxLR [1.2:2.8, by=0.4]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictLxTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("LAELAeqdiffScl [all]",
                                                                 "UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [0.5:1.5, by=0.25]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [1]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

model1predictTn <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASTonLdECMAPowAvgBin [all]",
                                                                 "UASEvents [all]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))

p1 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb, aes(x=LAELAeqdiffScl, y=dHighAnnoyProp, colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.05) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), alpha=0.5, linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.1, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +

              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$LAELAeqdiff,
                             stimDataNoAmb$LAELAeqdiffScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), limits=c(0, 1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE]~-~amb.~env.~italic(L)[Aeq]~","~dB)),
                   y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))
```

```{r}


mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.resD <- residuals(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE,
                                     type="deviance", plot.it=TRUE,
                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[1],identify=10)
mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.resM <- residuals(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE,
                                     type="mahalanobis", plot.it=TRUE,
                                     col=mycolours[2], identify=10)
mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.resP <- residuals(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE,
                                     type="pearson", plot.it=TRUE,
                                     pch=1, col=mycolours[3], identify=10)

hist(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.resD, breaks=20, main="Deviance residuals")
hist(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.resP, breaks=20, main="Pearson residuals")

par(mar = rep(2, 4))

mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.DfBc <- dfbeta(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE,
                                  level='clusters',
                                 coefs=c('LAELAeqdiffScl'))
mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.DfBo <- dfbeta(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE,
                                level='observations',
                               coefs=c('LAELAeqdiffScl'))

mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE.Cook <- cooks.distance(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE,
                                          plot.it=TRUE)

performance::check_collinearity(mABdHSxTndLAELAeq2lgQSq.GEE)

```

## with env LAeq and UAS LAE

### fit and examine final model

```{r}

model1 <- mABdHLAExEnvLAeqlgQ.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dHighAnnoy ~ I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                                                        UASLAEMaxLRScl*AmbLAeqMaxLRScl,
                                                        data=subjDataNoAmb,
                                                        family=binomial(link='logit'),
                                                        id=ID,
                                                        corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(mABdHTypexOpxLAExEnvlgQxLAE.GEE, mABdHLAElgQ.GEE,
                    mABdHLAExEnvLAeqlgQ.GEE)

predictProbs <- predictNew(model=model1, newData=stimDataNoAmb,
                           response=stimDataNoAmb$dHighAnnoyProp,
                           fixVars=c(TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl)))

R2probs <- cor(predictProbs$response, predictProbs$fit)^2
R2probs


# using ggplot, plot the predicted fit against the responses in predictProbs
ggplot(data=predictProbs) +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1, text=element_text(family = "serif", size=12),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
  
  geom_point(mapping=aes(x=response, y=fit), size=2.5, shape=1, colour=mycolours[1], alpha=0.5) +
  
  geom_abline(aes(intercept=0, slope=1), colour='grey', alpha=0.5) +
  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.5)) +
  
  labs(x=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb]~"("~test~")")),
       y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))


model1predictEvt <- ggeffects::predict_response(model1, terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:13]",
                                                                "UASEvents [all]"),
                                             margin='marginalmeans', type='fixed', 
                                            vcov=vcov(model1, type="bias-corrected"))


p1 <- ggplot(data=model1predictEvt) +
              theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35, text = element_text(family = "serif", size=16),
                    axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=14)) +
              
              geom_point(data=stimDataNoAmb[stimDataNoAmb$AmbientEnv=='Park',],
                         aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, y=dHighAnnoyProp, colour=factor(UASEvents), shape=factor(UASEvents)),
                         alpha=0.55, size=2) +
              
              geom_ribbon(aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high, fill=group), alpha=0.1) +
              
              geom_line(aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour=group), linewidth=1) +
              
              scale_color_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_fill_viridis(option='viridis', direction=1, discrete=TRUE, begin = 0.2, end = 0.8) +
              scale_shape_manual(values=c(4, 5, 7, 8)) +
              
              guides(colour=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     fill=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE),
                     shape=guide_legend(title="UAS events", reverse=TRUE)) +
            
              rescaleTicks(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR,
                             stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl, sep=5) +
              scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 1)) +
              
              labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)),
                   y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))


p1

if (savedata) {
  # save the model
  filename = "2B_dHA_LAE_EnvLAeq"
  saveRDS(model1, file=file.path(outDataPath, paste(filename, ".rds", sep="")))
}


```

```{r}
model1 <- mABdHSxTnDt1i2IrlgQSq.GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dHighAnnoy ~ I(log10(UASEvents)) +
                                                     Detect0p1IntMaxLRLogScl +

                                                     IntermitRatioC3MaxLRScl +
                                                     TrialNumberScl,
                                              data=subjDataNoAmb,

geeParams(model1, ci=0.95, exponentiate=FALSE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)
geeParams(model1, ci=0.843, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

  scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 0.7)) +

        y=expression(paste(Predicted~"%"~highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))
```

## Comparison between GEE-PA and GLMM-SS models with LAE predictor

### Timing comparison

```{r}

set.seed(808)

newData <- data.frame(UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(-12, 13, by=1), UASEvents=1,
                      TrialNumberScl=mean(subjDataNoAmb$TrialNumberScl))
# benchmark timing
testdHA <- microbenchmark::microbenchmark(
  
    'GLMM_model' = {model0GLMM <- lme4::glmer(dHighAnnoy ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1)
                                              + TrialNumberScl +
                                                (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1) | ID),
                                                  data=subjDataNoAmb, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                                              control=glmcontrol)},
    
    'GEE_model' = {model0GEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dHighAnnoy ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1)
                                              + TrialNumberScl,
                                                data=subjDataNoAmb, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                                                id=ID, corstr='exchangeable')},
    
    'GLMM_metrics' = {
                        PCP <- glmmPCP(model0GLMM)
                        cbind(performance::model_performance(model0GLMM,
                                                             metrics=c("AIC",
                                                                       "AICc",
                                                                       "BIC",
                                                                       "R2",
                                                                       "LOGLOSS")),
                                    PCP)
                        },
    
    'GEE_metrics' = {geeModelPerformance(model0GEE, verbose=TRUE)},
    
    'GLMM_prediction' = {model0GLMMpredict <- ggeffects::predict_response(model0GLMM,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [all]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='marginalmeans',
                                                       bias_correction=TRUE)},
    
    'GEE_prediction' = {model0GEEpredict <- ggeffects::predict_response(model0GEE,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [all]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='marginalmeans',
                                                      vcov=vcov(model0GEE, type="bias-corrected"))},
    times=10, unit='s', control=list(order='inorder'))

testdHA

glmmVsGEEdHA <- data.frame(model=summary(testdHA)[1,]$median/summary(testdHA)[2,]$median,
                          metrics=summary(testdHA)[3,]$median/summary(testdHA)[4,]$median,
                          pred=summary(testdHA)[5,]$median/summary(testdHA)[6,]$median,
                          total=sum(summary(testdHA)[1,]$median, summary(testdHA)[3,]$median, summary(testdHA)[5,]$median)/
                                sum(summary(testdHA)[2,]$median, summary(testdHA)[4,]$median, summary(testdHA)[6,]$median))

print(paste("Model:", glmmVsGEEdHA$model))
print(paste("Metrics:", glmmVsGEEdHA$metrics))
print(paste("Prediction:", glmmVsGEEdHA$pred))
print(paste("Total:", glmmVsGEEdHA$total))

microbenchmark:::autoplot.microbenchmark(testdHA)
microbenchmark:::boxplot.microbenchmark(testdHA)


```

### Plot comparison

```{r}

set.seed(808)

UASLAEMaxLRDummy <- seq(-12, 33, by=1) + (max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLR) -
                                            max(stimDataNoAmb$UASLAEMaxLRScl))

newData <- data.frame(UASLAEMaxLR=UASLAEMaxLRDummy,
                      UASLAEMaxLRScl=seq(-12, 33, by=1), UASEvents=1,
                      TrialNumberScl=0)

modelGLMM <- lme4::glmer(dHighAnnoy ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1) +
                             TrialNumberScl +
                           (1 + UASLAEMaxLRScl | ID),
                            data=subjDataNoAmb, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                         control=glmcontrol)

parameters::model_parameters(modelGLMM, exponentiate=TRUE)

PCP <- glmmPCP(modelGLMM)
print(cbind(performance::model_performance(modelGLMM,
                                           metrics=c("AIC", "AICc", "BIC",
                                                               "R2", "LOGLOSS")),
            PCP))


modelGEE <- glmtoolbox::glmgee(dHighAnnoy ~ UASLAEMaxLRScl + I(UASEvents^-1) +
                                              + TrialNumberScl,
                                  data=subjDataNoAmb, family=binomial(link='logit'),
                                  id=ID, corstr='exchangeable')

geeParams(modelGEE, ci=0.843, exponentiate=TRUE, varest='bias-corrected', verbose=FALSE)

geeModelPerformance(modelGEE)


mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_Qpredict <- modelbased::estimate_prediction(modelGLMM,
                                                                data = newData,
                                                                predict = "expectation",
                                                                ci = 0.95,
                                                                transform = TRUE,
                                                                keep_iterations = FALSE,
                                                                ci_method='wald')

mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_Qmarginal <- ggeffects::predict_response(modelGLMM,
                                                             terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:33]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                             type='fixed', margin='empirical',
                                                             bias_correction=TRUE)

mABdHLAE1_QSq.GEEpredict <- ggeffects::predict_response(modelGEE,
                                                      terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:33]",
                                                              "UASEvents [1]",
                                                              "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                       type='fixed', margin='marginalmeans',
                                                      vcov=vcov(modelGEE, type="bias-corrected"))

mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_QpredictAll <- ggeffects::predict_response(modelGLMM,
                                                          terms=c("UASLAEMaxLRScl [-12:33]",
                                                                  "ID [all]",
                                                                  "UASEvents [1]",
                                                                  "TrialNumberScl [0]"),
                                                         type='response', margin='empirical',
                                                         bias_correction=TRUE)

p <- ggplot() +
  theme(panel.grid = element_blank(), aspect.ratio=1.35,
        text = element_text(family = "serif"),
        plot.margin = unit(c(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5), "cm"),
        axis.text=element_text(family = "serif", size=11))


for (id in unique(mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_QpredictAll$group)){
  p <- p + geom_line(data=mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_QpredictAll[mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_QpredictAll$group==id,],
                     mapping=aes(x=x, y=predicted, colour="GLMM (CS)"),
                     alpha=0.1, linewidth=0.25)
}

p <- p +
  
    geom_ribbon(data=mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_Qpredict,
                mapping=aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl, ymin=CI_low, ymax=CI_high,
                            colour="GLMM (CS)"),
                alpha=0.5, fill=NA, linetype=3, linewidth=0.55) +
    
    geom_ribbon(data=mABdHLAE1_QSq.GEEpredict,
                mapping=aes(x=x, ymin=conf.low, ymax=conf.high,
                            colour="GEE (PA)"),
                alpha=0.5, fill=NA, linetype=4, linewidth=0.55) +
    
    geom_line(data=mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_Qpredict, mapping=aes(x=UASLAEMaxLRScl,
                                                            y=Predicted,
                                                        colour="GLMM (CS)"), linewidth=1) +
    
    geom_line(data=mABdHLAE1_QSq.GEEpredict, aes(x=x, y=predicted,
                                                colour="GEE (PA)"), linewidth=1) +
  
    geom_line(data=mABdHLAE1_QSq.LAE1_Qmarginal, mapping=aes(x=x,
                                                            y=predicted,
                                                        colour="GLMM (PA)"),
              linetype=2, linewidth=1, alpha=0.75) +
    
    scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(-12, 33, by=5), labels=seq(55, 100, by=5)) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), labels=seq(0, 100, by=10), limits=c(0, 1)) +
    
    scale_colour_manual(values=c("GLMM (CS)"=mycolours[3],
                                 "GEE (PA)"=mycolours[4],
                                "GLMM (PA)"=mycolours[9]),
                        breaks=c("GLMM (PA)",
                                 "GEE (PA)",
                                 "GLMM (CS)")) +
    guides(colour=guide_legend(title="Method", reverse=TRUE),
           fill=guide_legend(title="Method", reverse=TRUE)) +
    
    labs(x=expression(paste(UAS~italic(L)[AE],",",~dB)),
         y=expression(paste("%"~Highly~annoyed~"|"~HA~"'"[amb])))

p

filename <- "PtsABdHighAnnoyGLMMVsGEE"

if (saveplots){
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "svg"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".svg", sep=""))
  
  ggsave(filename=paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""), width=4.5, height=4,
         path=file.path(outFigPath, "pdf"))
  unlink(paste(filename, ".pdf", sep=""))
}


```
